xwikidoc.name: SingleAdvisoryImportPage
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Single Advisory Import Tool
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #if (!$services.security.authorization.hasAccess('admin')) This page is only available for admins. #stop #end #if ("$!request.get('advisoryUrl')" != '') #if ($services.csrf.isTokenValid($request.get('form_token'))) #try("importException") #set ($importReference = $services.securityadvisory.importAndSaveAdvisory($request.get('advisoryUrl'))) #end #if ("$!importException" != '') {{html}} #displayException('Error while trying to import advisory - Click to see details', $importException) {{/html}} #else #set ($redirectUrl = $xwiki.getURL($importReference)) #set ($discard = $response.sendRedirect($redirectUrl)) #end #else #set ($discard = $response.sendError(401, 'CSRF token verification failed!')) #end #else {{html clean="false"}}

{{/html}} #end {{/velocity}}
